title: fragaria vesca subsp. collina
intro: Fragaria vesca subsp. collina, also known as the alpine strawberry or woodland strawberry, is a subspecies of strawberry native to Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Fragaria vesca subsp. collina include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, to support overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
